title: Pink Mixed Balloons Set, 12 Inch Hot Pink Pastel Light Baby Pink Metallic Pink Latex Balloons Party Balloon for Women Girls Birthday Baby Shower Princess Anniversary Party Decorations
features: Pink Balloons Set：You will receive this 35pcs 12-inch shades of pink balloons, which includes 4 pink colors. 10pcs matte hot pink balloons, 10pcs matte pink balloons, 10pcs pastel pink balloons, 5pcs metallic pink balloons. Accompanying by a 10M ribbon. Hot pink colored decoration will embellish your theme party!

Superior Material: These pink balloons are made of premium latex material with excellent elasticity and durability, which ensures they won't burst or deflate easily. This balloon set is suitable for both air and helium inflation, kid and pet friendly, and a colorful party decoration of choice.

Easy to Use: For pink party decorations, the hot pink pastel pink balloons can be simply inflated with helium to let the balloons float, or you can use air to stick to walls, pillars and more. Using a hand pump, electric pump, or even blowing up balloons yourself for birthday parties, latex balloons can be quickly formed with minimal effort. Latex balloons are best inflated to 85-90% to avoid explosion.

Versatile Applications: These hot pink pastel pink balloons are suitable for all kinds of parties. Whether it is a baby shower, pink birthday party, wedding, bridal shower, Princess party, these pink balloons can always bring you joy, enjoy your exclusive theme party!

Warm Tips: Please be careful not to overfill the balloon to avoid bursting. Please avoid sharp objects or sunlight. Please note that there will be a certain color difference before and after inflation. Balloons are a suffocation hazard, please keep these pink balloons out of the reach of children, and children must be supervised by adults when using them.
description: Product Description HILAVO latex balloons are available in 35PC and 60PC, and a total of 19 color themes are available for you to choose from. Suitable for tropical Hawaiian parties in summer, pink and purple parties for girls, cartoon theme parties for boys. HILAVO party balloons with superior latex material, coloful balloons combination and nflation with air or helium. Superior Material These party balloons are made of premium latex material with excellent elasticity and durability, which ensures they won't burst or deflate easily and can be reused multiple times. Air&Helium Inflation These latex balloon set is suitable for both air and helium inflation, suitable for all types of parties, great for party decorations and a colorful party decoration of choice Easy to Use Using a hand pump, electric pump, or even blowing up balloons yourself for birthday parties, latex balloons can be quickly formed with minimal effort. Versatile Applications These party balloons are suitable for all kinds of parties, such as baby shower, bridal shower, girls/boys birthday party, wedding, graduation party and more. Usage Notice Please be careful not to overfill the balloon to avoid bursting. Please avoid sharp objects or sunlight. Please note that there will be a certain color difference before and after inflation. Keep Away from Babies Balloons are a suffocation hazard, please keep these purple balloons out of the reach of children, and children must be supervised by adults when using them.
